day_modifiers: World Cup match day — align with 6PM and 9:30PM kickoffs

posting_schedule.title: Match Day at Lady E Luck
posting_schedule.timing_reason: First post of day — 7AM Reel peak window. Sets the entire day's energy. Friday boost active.

posting_schedule.timing_reason: Feed image peak window 8AM. Morning ritual scrollers. 1 hour after Reel — respects spacing rule.

posting_schedule.title: Today's Match Day Energy
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story — 60-90 min after last story slot. Morning momentum continues.

posting_schedule.title: New Player Bonus — The Game Starts Here
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Feed image peak 11AM. Lunch break scroll begins. 3 hours after last feed — respects 2hr spacing. New player welcome is most effective when players have time to sign up.

posting_schedule.title: Lady E Welcomes You
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story supporting the 11AM feed post. Catches feed viewers who missed it.

posting_schedule.title: Meet Lucky Lou — He's Back
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story — 90 min after last story. Peak lunch window 11AM-1PM still active.

posting_schedule.title: Hat Trick Bonus — Today Only
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Feed image peak 2PM. Launches Hat Trick Bonus window (3PM-6PM) — 1 hour heads-up. Australia vs Egypt match is live at 2PM, creating World Cup context.

posting_schedule.title: Golden Boot Jackpot — Mid-Day Drop
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Reel at 3PM — aligns with Hat Trick Bonus window opening (3PM-6PM). Afternoon break window active. 8 hours after morning Reel — respects 3hr spacing.

posting_schedule.title: Penalty Kick Free Spin — Referral Code Drop
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Groups post peak window 2PM. Not after 8PM rule respected. Active player community engaged in afternoon.

posting_schedule.title: Hat Trick Bonus — Story Reminder
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story — 3 hours into Hat Trick window (3PM-6PM), urgency building. 90 min after last story.

posting_schedule.title: Summer Crew Jackpot Celebration
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Feed image peak 6PM. Argentina vs Cape Verde kicks off at 6PM — maximum World Cup energy. Post-work Facebook scroll peak. 4 hours after last feed — solid spacing.

posting_schedule.title: Daily Bonus Wheel — Spin Before Midnight
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story during evening rush 6PM-9PM peak. 60 min after last story. Argentina match in progress — players checking phones.

posting_schedule.title: Match Night at Lady E Luck
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story during evening rush. Argentina match finishing up. 90 min after last story.

posting_schedule.title: Daily Bonus — Claim It Now
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story at 9:30PM — Colombia vs Ghana kickoff. Late night peak window begins (9PM-Midnight). Daily bonus urgency escalates. 60 min after last story.

posting_schedule.title: Halftime Reload — Mystery Drop
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Story at 10PM — Golden Hour starts. Colombia match halftime or in-play. Late night peak is NOW. Only stories during match play (won't interrupt viewing).

posting_schedule.title: Lucky Lou Wins — The Final Whistle
posting_schedule.timing_reason: Final Reel of day. 11PM — peak late night window. Colombia match ending around this time. Day's emotional payoff. Lucky Lou always wins. Last major content push.

spacing_check.feed_images_spacing: 7AM(none), 8AM, 11AM(3hr gap), 2PM(3hr gap), 6PM(4hr gap) — all exceed 2hr minimum ✅
